name: Zechariah
oracleText:
Flash
Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, tap target creature an opponent controls. It doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, scry 1.
flavorText: "Thou shalt be dumb, and not able to speak." — Luke 1:20
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Vision of Zacharias" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Struck Silent in the Sanctuary

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Vision of Zacharias
classics.sourceNotes: A direct Zechariah-in-the-sanctuary scene makes this an exact classics fit.
